sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83387" key="plaggo/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλαγγόνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n83387.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ointment</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0586.tlg001:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">64</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1685.tlg001:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sosib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:104" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.104</biblScope></bibl>. (Named from the inventor, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Πλαγγών</foreign>.)</sense> </entryFree>
